default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss the potential hiring of a finance-focused employee and strategize on company growth and financial management.](https://fathom.video/share/k-RhC9kf2TSLsMfY_UCSddd1zjd1BcWx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Considering hiring a finance professional for \~$200k/year to handle bookkeeping, invoicing, and some HR tasks](https://fathom.video/share/k-RhC9kf2TSLsMfY_UCSddd1zjd1BcWx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Debating the need for both operational finance support and strategic financial guidance](https://fathom.video/share/k-RhC9kf2TSLsMfY_UCSddd1zjd1BcWx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Discussing challenges of international hiring, currency fluctuations, and contractor vs. employee classifications](https://fathom.video/share/k-RhC9kf2TSLsMfY_UCSddd1zjd1BcWx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Planning to create a headcount plan to determine high-leverage roles and hiring priorities](https://fathom.video/share/k-RhC9kf2TSLsMfY_UCSddd1zjd1BcWx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Potential Finance Hire Role and Responsibilities

  - [Candidate would handle invoicing, bill pay, payroll, customer invoicing, collections, and tax-related tasks](https://fathom.video/share/k-RhC9kf2TSLsMfY_UCSddd1zjd1BcWx?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)
  - [Would manage bookkeeping firm to ensure clean, accurate monthly financials](https://fathom.video/share/k-RhC9kf2TSLsMfY_UCSddd1zjd1BcWx?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Additional responsibilities may include HR tasks, expense approvals, and contract management](https://fathom.video/share/k-RhC9kf2TSLsMfY_UCSddd1zjd1BcWx?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Not expected to handle strategic finance; focus on operational finance and systems](https://fathom.video/share/k-RhC9kf2TSLsMfY_UCSddd1zjd1BcWx?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)
  - [Candidate has experience with high transaction volume and complex billing systems](https://fathom.video/share/k-RhC9kf2TSLsMfY_UCSddd1zjd1BcWx?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [Compensation is high (\~$200k/year) due to relocation while at previous company](https://fathom.video/share/k-RhC9kf2TSLsMfY_UCSddd1zjd1BcWx?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)

### Growth Strategy and Financial Management

  - [Company has $10 million in the bank, considering burning $4-5 million before returning to profitability](https://fathom.video/share/k-RhC9kf2TSLsMfY_UCSddd1zjd1BcWx?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Current approach feels more natural than aggressive burning of funds](https://fathom.video/share/k-RhC9kf2TSLsMfY_UCSddd1zjd1BcWx?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
  - [Need to balance hiring at manager level vs. building out entire teams](https://fathom.video/share/k-RhC9kf2TSLsMfY_UCSddd1zjd1BcWx?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)

### International Hiring and Currency Considerations

  - [Discussed challenges with currency fluctuations when hiring internationally](https://fathom.video/share/k-RhC9kf2TSLsMfY_UCSddd1zjd1BcWx?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Explored options for setting salaries in USD vs. local currencies](https://fathom.video/share/k-RhC9kf2TSLsMfY_UCSddd1zjd1BcWx?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
  - [Considered implications of using Employer of Record (EOR) services for international hires](https://fathom.video/share/k-RhC9kf2TSLsMfY_UCSddd1zjd1BcWx?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [Noted potential risks and benefits of contractor vs. employee classifications in different countries](https://fathom.video/share/k-RhC9kf2TSLsMfY_UCSddd1zjd1BcWx?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

### Headcount Planning

  - [Agreed to create a headcount plan to identify 2-3 high-leverage roles](https://fathom.video/share/k-RhC9kf2TSLsMfY_UCSddd1zjd1BcWx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Will determine how the potential finance hire fits into overall staffing needs](https://fathom.video/share/k-RhC9kf2TSLsMfY_UCSddd1zjd1BcWx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Plan to assess which areas will be covered by new hire and which gaps remain to be filled](https://fathom.video/share/k-RhC9kf2TSLsMfY_UCSddd1zjd1BcWx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bridget to put together a draft of headcount planning and role allocations](https://fathom.video/share/k-RhC9kf2TSLsMfY_UCSddd1zjd1BcWx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Marcel to create an organizational chart for review](https://fathom.video/share/k-RhC9kf2TSLsMfY_UCSddd1zjd1BcWx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Schedule a follow-up meeting to discuss headcount plan and org chart](https://fathom.video/share/k-RhC9kf2TSLsMfY_UCSddd1zjd1BcWx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Further evaluate the potential finance hire in context of overall staffing strategy](https://fathom.video/share/k-RhC9kf2TSLsMfY_UCSddd1zjd1BcWx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

action_items.description: Create headcount plan. Include new finance hire + other key roles.  Prep for review w/ Marcel.
Prepare quick org chart for review w/ Bridget.  Align w/ headcount planning discussion.
